scope_note: This panel summarizes the structured course-rigor and application-guidance notes currently exported for this school. It remains source-backed and does not infer missing requirements.

areas.name: Course rigor
areas.summary: No simple minimum course-rigor formula is stated on the cited Princeton pages, but Princeton asks for teacher recommendations from higher level courses in core academic areas.
areas.detail: No simple minimum course-rigor formula is stated on the cited Princeton pages, but Princeton asks for teacher recommendations from higher level courses in core academic areas.

areas.name: Recommendations
areas.summary: Princeton requires a counselor recommendation plus two teacher recommendations from higher level courses in different academic areas.
areas.detail: Princeton requires a counselor recommendation plus two teacher recommendations from higher level courses in different academic areas.

areas.name: Essays
areas.summary: Princeton requires Princeton-specific questions and a graded written paper for first-year applicants.
areas.detail: Princeton requires Princeton-specific questions and a graded written paper for first-year applicants.
